title: TTS voice quality
description: Rate the quality of the generated agent's voice.

questions.text: Please rate the degree of effort you had to make to understand the message.
Were single words hard to understand?
Were the speech sounds clearly distinguishable?
Was the articulation of speech sounds precise?
Was the voice you heard pleasant to listen to?
Did the voice sound natural?
To what extent did the voice sound like a human?
Did the voice sound harsh, raspy, or strained?
Did emphasis of important words occur?
Did the rhythm of the speech sound natural?
Did the intonation pattern of sentences sound smooth and natural?
Did the voice appear to be trustworthy?
Did the voice suggest a confident speaker?
Did the voice seem to be enthusiastic?
Was the voice persuasive?

title: Agent interaction quality
description: Rate the quality of the interaction with the voice agent, focusing on timing, turn-taking, delays, pauses, interruptions, and conversational flow.

questions.text: The delay between my speech and the agent's reply felt acceptable.
How free-flowing did the conversation feel?
How natural did the conversation feel?
How often during the conversation did you experience awkward pauses, interruptions, or talking over the agent?

title: Passive listening difficulty
description: Rate how difficult it was to UNDERSTAND the agent's voice in a noisy café-like acoustic scene.

questions.text: How much of the agent's speech could you understand in this conversation?
How much effort did it take you to understand the agent's speech?

title: Communication difficulty
description: Rate how difficult it was to communicate (INTERACT) with the agent in the noisy café-like acoustic scene.

questions.text: How stressful was it to have this conversation?
The noise made it hard to have a smooth back-and-forth exchange with the agent.
How successful was the communication overall?
How often did you have to ask the agent to repeat or rephrase something?

title: Task ecological validity
description: Rate how realistic and meaningful the role-play task felt as a situation you might encounter in everyday life. Focus on the task and your engagement with it, not on the voice quality or background noise.

questions.text: How relevant was this listening situation to your everyday life?
The task I was asked to complete is something I could imagine doing in a real café.
How engaged did you feel in the role-play task?

title: Acoustic scene ecological validity
description: Rate how realistic and immersive the café-like acoustic environment sounded. Focus on the background noise, the sense of being in a real café, and whether the target voice fit naturally into that environment.

questions.text: The acoustic environment sounded like a real café I might find myself in.
How immersive did the acoustic environment feel?
How realistic was the background noise for a café environment?
How realistic was the target voice sound for a café environment?
